calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && sed -n '1,240p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-appeal-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court ca11 --docket 68252091 --event evt-appeal-disposition\nrg --files data/cases/ca11/68252091 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find . -path '*/record/context.json' -o -path '*/record/documents.json' -o -iname '*68252091*' -o -path '*/snapshots/*' | sort | sed -n '1,240p'
printf '\nEVENT\n'
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/event.yaml
printf '\nENV IDENTIFIERS (non-secret only)\n'
env | LC_ALL=C sort | rg '^(COURT_ID|DOCKET_ID|EVENT_ID|PREDICTOR_ID|RUN_ID|MODEL_ID|DECIDED_BEFORE|FEDCOURTS.*RECORD|.*SNAPSHOT.*)=' || true","workdir":"/h

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"printf '%s\n' 'CONTEXT'
sed -n '1,240p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/context.json
printf '%s\n' 'SNAPSHOT'
sed -n '1,360p' data/cases/ca11/68252091/record/snapshots/2026-07-11.json
printf '%s\n' 'RECORD FILES'
rg --files data/cases/ca11/68252091/record | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help\nrg -n \"appeal-disposition|mandamus|by disposition|Appeal\" metrics/statpack.md | sed -n '1,220p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court ca11 --limit 10 --corpus-backend ranged 2>&1","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const t = ALL_TOOLS.find(x => x.name==="mcp__courtlistener__search"); if(!t){text("missing");exit();} const r=await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",court:"ca11",q:"mandamus \"clear and indisputable\" \"adequate means\"",order_by:"score desc",num_results:8,fields:["caseName","dateFiled","citation","absolute_url","snippet"]}); for (const c of (r.content||[])) { if (c.type==="text") text(c.text); else if (c.type==="image") image(c); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"ls -la corpus corpus/corpus.db* 2>/dev/null || true\nrg -n \"writ of mandamus|clear and indisputable|In re.*mandamus|extraordinary remedy\" data docs tests metrics -g '*.md' -g '*.json' -g '*.yaml' | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ\nfind data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/predictions -maxdepth 4 -type f 2>/dev/null | sort || true","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":2000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/prediction.json

+  \

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git status --short\nfor f in data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/*; do printf '%s\\n' \"$f\"; sed -n '1,260p' \"$f\"; done\nUV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z/reasoning.md
@@
-Nothing in the available docket establishes any of the demanding prerequisites. The absence of the petition text is not evidence against DeBose, but it leaves no case-specific basis to move materially above the very low mandamus-grant prior. The pro se-style IFP posture and lack of any resp

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"OUT=data/cases/ca11/68252091/events/evt-appeal-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260711T091155Z
rg -n 'UV_CACHE|REDIS|COURT_ID|DOCKET_ID|EVENT_ID|PREDICTOR_ID|RUN_ID|MODEL_ID' "$OUT" || true
UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data
find "$OUT" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | LC_ALL=C sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output);
